title: hydrangea serrata f. rosalba
intro: Hydrangea serrata f. rosalba, also known as the mountain hydrangea or serrated leaf hydrangea, is a deciduous shrub native to mountainous regions in East Asia, characterized by its striking white flowers and serrated leaves. In traditional medicine, the roots and stems of Hydrangea serrata f. rosalba are used to treat various health conditions, including rheumatism and arthritis, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Hydrangea serrata f. rosalba can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal supplements, but its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
